meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Learn how to use an Antigravity project template to overcome debugging bottlenecks. A high-efficiency guide for intermediate developers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting opaque stack traces. By implementing an Antigravity project template, you standardize your environment, enforce strict architectural boundaries, and leverage Claude Code for automated root-cause analysis. This system transforms chaotic debugging sessions into predictable, repeatable workflows, allowing you to ship production-ready features for clients in half the time.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your codebase has devolved into a labyrinth of silent failures. We have all been there: staring at a cryptic error message at 2 AM, realizing that your lack of a standardized development scaffold is the only thing standing between you and a completed project. 

It is time to stop patching holes and start building with intent. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural anchor, providing the structural integrity required to isolate bugs before they manifest. By combining this rigid framework with the iterative power of Claude Code, you move from reactive troubleshooting to proactive engineering, ensuring every line of code you ship is verified, robust, and client-ready.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure observability is baked into every module from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project template with integrated logging, error boundary patterns, and a standardized debugging directory structure for a production SaaS application.

steps.title: Configure Automated Error Interception
steps.description: Set up global error handlers that automatically pipe stack traces into your debugging workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a global error middleware that captures runtime exceptions and formats them for Claude Code analysis, including state snapshots.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with Scoped Testing
steps.description: Use your template's built-in testing harness to create a reproduction script for the specific bug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test case that reproduces the current memory leak in the authentication module using the project's existing testing utility.

steps.title: Automated Root-Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the reproduction output into Claude Code to identify the architectural flaw.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided stack trace and test output. Identify the root cause and propose a fix that adheres to the Antigravity pattern.

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Verify the fix within the template's staging environment before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the proposed fix against all existing regression tests and ensure zero performance regressions.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'debug-logs' folder inside your Antigravity template that is ignored by Git but indexed by your local Claude instance.
Use Claude Code's 'context' flag to pin your project's architectural documentation, ensuring every fix aligns with your original design pattern.
Implement 'Canary Checks' in your template that run on every build to catch drift from your Antigravity standard.
Leverage Claude Code to auto-generate JSDoc comments for any complex logic you fix, preventing future technical debt.
Create a 'Troubleshooting' markdown file in your template root that Claude Code can reference to understand common project-specific pitfalls.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://architecture.patterns.dev
content.next_steps: Once your template is configured, build a library of 'Fix Prompts' tailored to your specific tech stack to automate 90% of your future debugging tasks.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your development speed. Take control of your workflow, standardize your output, and deliver high-value code that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
